hero.headline: I obsess over interfaces that are never forgotten.
hero.sub: Frontend Engineer — UI/UX · Cloud · Security · AI

about.label: Manifesto
about.headline: I'm obsessed with that last 10% that transforms a good UI into an unforgettable experience.
about.body: I don't build websites. I build digital territories where the user gets lost in the best possible way. Every project is an artifact: it has weight, texture, intention. Alongside client work, I founded Noctra Studio — a frontend agency building performant digital products for startups across Latin America.

principles.title: Details are the product
principles.body: The last 10% is what separates a good UI from one that gets remembered. I don't stop at functional — I stop at right.

principles.title: Security is not an afterthought
principles.body: I build with OWASP, RLS, and rate-limiting as defaults. A beautiful interface that leaks data is a liability.

principles.title: I own the outcome
principles.body: I don't hand off tasks. I take problems, disappear for a while, and return with something better than asked for.

experience.label: Trajectory
experience.headline: The journey so far.
experience.intro: From building e-commerce at scale to leading UI systems at a global firm — and eventually founding my own studio. Each role taught me something the previous one couldn't.

contact.label: Contact
contact.headline: If you're building something ambitious, I want to hear about it.
contact.subtext: Currently open to full-time roles and selective collaborations. Based in Querétaro, MX — working remotely worldwide.
